titleStmt.title: SII 9.70: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 70. (A.R. No. 44 of 1904.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE FLOOR OF THE PLATFORM OF THE KUMARASVAMIN TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 893, Prajāpati, Phālguṇa, (ba. ?) trayōdaśī, Gurudina, corresponding to A.D. 971 February 23, Thursday, in the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Khoṭṭiga. It records the setting up of the image of Skanda by Gadādhara of Bhaṭṭa-Taḻā village and the grant of some land for the worship of the god by the king. The language of the record is Sanskrit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī . śakanṛpakāḷātīta saṁva
tsaratriyadhikanavatyaṣṭaśataprajā
patiśaṁ(saṁ)vatsarē varēndrimaṇḍaḷē
bhaṭṭataṟāgramōtpaṇnaśrīga
dādharēṇa siddhayōgē trayōdaśī
gurudinē phālguṇamāsē śrīmada
yugmalōcanasutasva skandadē
vasya pratiṣṭhā kritā . namastē sūna vē
śaṁbhōḥ sarvvavighnavināsinē . sarvvadē
vaśirassōbharatna saṁghaṭṭitāṁghra yē
pāḷayati sati prāñē khoṭṭigē
rājñimēdinīṁ . kṛtvā niṣkaṁṭakāñcaṇḍē
mānitāsēṣasajjanē . brahmacaryyāśra
mē samyak sthitē nāḷakapardinē . gadādha
rāya bhūrdattā varṇinā satilōdakaṁ .
maryyādā paścimē vāpī hra
daṁ prācyāmasaṁgamaṁ krōśārddhaṁ
dakṣiṇē viddhi prākāraṁ cōtta
rē tathā . Ihayva svāmi
nassthānē yastu daṁḍāsanī muni
rbhaviṣyati gṛhantasya vasudhā
tra dvijātibhiḥ . gaḍādharēṇa tu
bhriśaṁ pādau vandya punaṟpunaḥ dattā
gṛhārtthaṁ viprēpu vibhajya tuyyathā
yyathā . karttumiścati yaḥ kaścit
bhūmilōpaṁ durātmakaḥ . sa yāti
narakaṁ ghōraṁ pitaraissaha niścitaṁ .
yēvaṁ sa tatra bhūdēvamunigrāmādikaṁ
ttathā . nō Urbyāṁ bhūmilōpaścēnniha
ntabyō narādhamaḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā
dattā rājānassagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya
yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasu
ndharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivariṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . gaṁgāpūtē sadā ramyē
varēndrīpuṇyamaṇḍaḷē . durggamōttaradigbhā
gē grāmaṟpāhuniyōjanē . śrī
karmmārakuḷāhvayadvijavaragrāmasya ta
tkāritō niṣkramya kramanirmaḷa ḥ
samabhavattasminṛṣiṟpaṇḍita
statputrō prathitaḥ kṣitāvatibaḷaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
